summary: A Fox News broadcast segment (anchor Bret Baier, LIVE chyron, FOX NEWS channel bug, lower-thirds reading 'NOEM VISITS PRISON HOLDING SUSPECTED GANG MEMBERS' and 'DEPORTATION COLLABORATION') covering Secretary Noem's tour of El Salvador's CECOT prison, with embedded B-roll of shaved-head tattooed detainees behind bars and Noem walking the facility. Correspondent Griff Jenkins narrates and Noem's warning ('do not come to our country illegally... you will be removed and prosecuted') is played. This is a recorded TV news package, not stylized/music-driven youth-appeal content, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: FOX NEWS / LIVE; 'NOEM VISITS PRISON HOLDING SUSPECTED GANG MEMBERS'; 'DEPORTATION COLLABORATION - HOMELAND SECURITY SECRETARY VISITS EL SALVADOR PRISON'; 'TECOLUCA, EL SALVADOR'; 'THE FIRST 100 DAYS - IMMIGRATION CRACKDOWN'; KRISTI NOEM | HOMELAND SECURITY SECRETARY
